mapper.select: select count(*) from pms_patient where identification_no = #{identificationNo}
mapper.insert: insert into pms_patient (id, name, date_of_birth, identification_no, home_address, phone_no, gender, medical_record_no) values (#{id}, #{name}, #{dateOfBirth}, #{identificationNo}, #{homeAddress}, #{phoneNo}, #{gender}, #{medicalRecordNo})
